features: Smells very similar to the Original Tribe: A true 90s throwback! Our perfume captures the sweet, fruity-floral scent you remember from this iconic fragrance.
Nostalgic Vibes: Instantly transport yourself back to carefree teenage days, first loves, and 90s summer nights.
Affordable Alternative: Get the scent you loved without the vintage price tag.
Perfect Gift. Ideal for millennials, 90s kids, or anyone who adores nostalgic beauty finds. A thoughtful throwback present.
Everyday Feel-Good Fragrance: Light, playful and full of good vibes – perfect for daily wear, festivals, or whenever you need a happiness boost.
Vegan and Cruelty-Free: Made with love and respect – our fragrance is 100% vegan and never tested on animals.
description: Product description Bring the 90s back to life with our beautifully crafted dupe of the iconic Tribe perfume by Coty. Sweet, fruity and floral, this scent will instantly transport you to carefree teenage memories, dancefloor moments, and endless summer days. Perfect as a gift for 90s kids or a treat for yourself, our Tribe-inspired fragrance is light, playful, and full of happiness. Whether you're craving a blast from the past or searching for your signature scent, this affordable alternative lets you relive those golden years without the hefty vintage price. Get ready for ALL the compliments and "OMG you smell like my teenage years!" moments. 🌸 Directions Spray a small amount onto wrists as desired and allow a few seconds to dry. Safety Warning Warnings: For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. If product gets into your eyes, please rinse well with water and seek medical attention. See more
